shortDescription: DSA partner app — leads, commissions, referrals & analytics by Kuber Finserve
fullDescription:
KuberOne Partner empowers Direct Selling Agents (DSAs) and financial partners with tools to grow their business.

KEY FEATURES
• Lead management & scoring
• Application pipeline tracking
• Commission ledger & payouts
• Referral program management
• Branch & regional analytics
• Document collection for customers
• In-app support & escalations

BUILT FOR PARTNERS
• Real-time commission visibility
• Performance dashboards
• Secure customer data handling

Join the Kuber Finserve partner network with KuberOne Partner.
keywords: DSA, partner, commission, leads, referrals, loan agent, Kuber Finserve, KuberOne
